flags.message: The provisioned snapshot (record/snapshots/2026-07-01.json) is a bulk-import docket shell: no docket entries, no docket number, and every date field (filed, argued, terminated, cert granted/denied) is null. The only usable signals are the case caption and one linked opinion cluster, so this prediction is driven by the corpus reference-class base rate rather than case-specific facts. The 'petition disposition' framing also fits this docket awkwardly: it appears to be a pre-certiorari-era matter heard under mandatory writ-of-error/appeal jurisdiction, so the granted/denied outcome space may not map cleanly onto its realized merits disposition.
